author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

These were revealed in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50968#issuecomment-4522242315.

Notably somehow the `/AlCaLumiPixelsCountsExpress/Commissioning2021-v1/RAW` has event content
```
BXVector<GlobalAlgBlk>              "hltGtStage2Digis"          ""               "HLT"
BXVector<GlobalExtBlk>              "hltGtStage2Digis"          ""               "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EGamma>               "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EGamma"         "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EGamma>               "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EGamma2"        "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EGamma>               "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EGamma3"        "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EGamma>               "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EGamma4"        "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EGamma>               "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EGamma5"        "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EGamma>               "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EGamma6"        "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EtSum>                "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EtSum"          "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EtSum>                "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EtSum2"         "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EtSum>                "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EtSum3"         "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EtSum>                "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EtSum4"         "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EtSum>                "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EtSum5"         "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::EtSum>                "hltGtStage2Digis"          "EtSum6"         "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Jet>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Jet"            "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Jet>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Jet2"           "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Jet>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Jet3"           "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Jet>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Jet4"           "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Jet>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Jet5"           "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Jet>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Jet6"           "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Muon>                 "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Muon"           "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Muon>                 "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Muon2"          "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Muon>                 "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Muon3"          "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Muon>                 "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Muon4"          "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Muon>                 "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Muon5"          "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Muon>                 "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Muon6"          "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Tau>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Tau"            "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Tau>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Tau2"           "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Tau>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Tau3"           "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Tau>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Tau4"           "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Tau>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Tau5"           "HLT"
BXVector<l1t::Tau>                  "hltGtStage2Digis"          "Tau6"           "HLT"
edm::TriggerResults                 "TriggerResults"            ""               "HLT"
reco::PixelClusterCountsInEvent     "hltAlcaPixelClusterCounts"   "alcaPCCEvent"   "HLT"
```
that has nothing to do with RAW. This is quite confusing.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2254

#### PR validation:

None
title: [EVOLUTION_X] Disable more workflows that read non-RAW input files
